overview.description: Mudaris Portal is a multi-tenant education and academy management platform designed to centralize communication, collaboration, and content delivery for academies.

problemStatement.summary: Educational institutions rely on fragmented tools that lack structure, privacy, and scalability.

solution.description: A workspace-based multi-tenant platform allowing academies to operate independently.

architecture.multiTenancy: Implemented via Supabase Row Level Security

title: Mughal Labs — Nexus Mobile App

overview.description: Nexus — Mughal Labs is a fully native React Native mobile application that serves as a unified digital gateway for patients, consultants, and the organization. The app bridges the gap between Mughal Labs' backend laboratory information system (LIS) and its end users through a clean, intuitive mobile experience.

problemStatement.summary: Mughal Labs needed a cross-platform mobile application to digitize their patient experience and streamline operations. Patients had to physically visit lab branches to collect reports, check pricing, or request home sampling — leading to long wait times, inconvenience, and operational bottlenecks.
problems: Patients had no digital access to their lab test reports
Consultants could not remotely look up patient results
No online test pricing transparency for patients
Home sample collection was managed manually via phone calls
Lab and pharmacy branch locations were not easily discoverable

responsibilities: Secure authentication system with MFA & biometrics
QR code scanning for instant report access
Google Maps integration with proximity-based sorting
WhatsApp integration for home sample collection
Consultant portal for remote patient report retrieval
Test rate calculator with multi-tier pricing

solution.description: We designed and developed Nexus — Mughal Labs, a fully native React Native mobile application that serves as a unified digital gateway for patients, consultants, and the organization — bridging the gap between Mughal Labs' backend LIS and its end users.

features.title: Digital Report Access
details: Login via Patient Number & Case Number or QR code scan
View and download test reports as PDFs
Real-time status tracking: Registered → Test In Process → Approved → Delivered

features.title: Consultant Portal
details: Search reports by date range, patient number, or phone
Remote access to improve diagnosis turnaround

features.title: Test Rate Calculator
details: Search tests by name or code
Three pricing tiers: Standard, Zakat, and Welfare Rate

features.title: Home Sample Collection
details: In-app booking form with patient details
Floating WhatsApp button for quick-access booking

features.title: Secure Authentication
details: QR Code scanning for instant report access

features.title: Donation Module
details: In-app donation form for welfare initiatives
Three collection methods: Mail/Courier, Bank Cheque, Door-Step Pickup

architecture.multiTenancy: Dual-portal system: Patient access & Consultant access with role-based routing
architecture.realtime: Real-time report status tracking (Registered → Test In Process → Approved → Delivered)

challenges: Integrating with legacy laboratory information system (LIS) API
GPS-based proximity sorting across multiple branches
Secure handling of sensitive medical data
WhatsApp deep-link integration for home sampling workflow
impact: Eliminated in-person visits for report collection — patients access results digitally 24/7
Reduced consultant turnaround — doctors retrieve patient data remotely in seconds
Pricing transparency — patients compare rates across Standard, Zakat & Welfare tiers
Streamlined home sampling — WhatsApp-powered booking replaced manual phone coordination
Branch discoverability — GPS locator drives walk-in traffic to nearest lab or pharmacy
Security-first design — MFA and biometric login protect sensitive medical data
Social welfare support — in-app donation module connects Mughal Labs with community donors
